page: Microsoft Azure EC16eds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECEDV6 server family. It is powered by an Intel processor with an x86_64 architecture, providing 16 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs). The instance features 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server type includes 945 GB of local storage disk capacity and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. Virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The configuration does not include any graphics processing units (GPUs) or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high memory density of 8.0 GB per core and bundled local storage, the EC16eds_v6 offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial memory footprints without the overhead of separate storage attachments. This resource profile is suited for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, and enterprise workloads that benefit from local scratch space and premium storage capabilities.
description: Microsoft Azure EC16eds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECEDV6 family, designed for resource-intensive workloads. Powered by an Intel x86_64 processor, it features 16 dedicated vCPUs and 128.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The server is equipped with 945 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It does not include integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy applications, offering a balanced combination of dense RAM and local disk space. The EC16eds_v6 is suited for database deployments, memory-intensive enterprise applications, and workloads requiring fast local storage access.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC16eds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 16 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and 945 GB of local storage, designed for database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC16eds_v6 is a memory-optimized VM with 16 Intel vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 945 GB local storage, running on Microsoft Hyper-V.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixteen dedicated cores, high memory density, and integrated local storage for demanding enterprise workloads.
